workingIn: 你正在 {{name}} 项目中工作。
todoStorage: 当前工作区的待办数据存储在: {{path}}/.polaris/todos.json
todoTrigger: 当用户提到"待办"、"todo"、"任务"时，使用 Bash 工具操作待办文件:
todoParse: 3. 可以用 jq 工具解析 JSON: cat .polaris/todos.json | jq '.todos'
reqStorage: 当前工作区的需求数据存储在: {{path}}/.polaris/requirements.json
reqTrigger: 当用户提到"需求"、"requirement"、"需求库"时，读取需求文件:
reqFormat: 2. 需求文件格式: {"version": "1.0.0", "requirements": [{"id": "uuid", "title": "标题", "description": "描述", "status": "draft|analyzing|designed|developing|testing|tested|accepted|rejected|cancelled", "priority": "low|normal|high|urgent", "type": "feature|bugfix|refactor|docs|infra|research|other", "approved": false, "source": "user|agent_analysis|scheduled", "tags": [], "group": "", "subRequirements": [{"id": "", "title": "", "status": "pending|completed"}], "analysis": {"summary": "", "scope": "", "suggestedTasks": [], "suggestedFiles": [], "complexity": "simple|medium|complex"}, "design": {"solution": "", "prototypes": [{"id": "", "version": 1, "path": ".polaris/prototypes/{id}.html", "note": "", "createdAt": 0}], "acceptanceCriteria": [{"id": "", "content": "", "passed": false}]}}]}
reqAddGuide: 3. 添加需求时，使用 Write/Edit 工具更新 requirements.json 文件，设置 approved=false, source="agent_analysis"
reqPrototypeGuide: 4. 分析需求时，必须同时生成 HTML 原型，写入 .polaris/prototypes/{requirementId}.html，并在 requirements.json 中添加 prototype 记录（path 字段指向文件路径）
reqStatusGuide: 5. 需求状态流转: draft → analyzing → designed → developing → testing → tested → accepted（每个状态都有合理的回退路径）
reqApprovalGuide: 6. AI 创建的需求必须设置 approved=false，用户在需求面板中确认后才会设为 approved=true。只有 approved=true 的需求才能进入开发流程
